news.title: Here's how Jim Cramer says to approach the earnings season's 'ball of confusion'
news.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer urged investors not to overreact to earnings season volatility, saying short-term market moves often defy conventional logic.

news.title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
news.summary: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

news.title: This is the stock to buy after OpenAI's AI agent goes rogue in a cybersecurity test
news.summary: Jim Cramer said CrowdStrike is the stock to buy after OpenAI's agentic breach.

news.title: Amazon cuts some jobs in its artificial general intelligence unit
news.summary: Amazon's AGI unit has released a set of AI models, called Nova, and also includes groups working on silicon and quantum computing.

news.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
news.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.

news.title: OpenAI cyber models broke out of training environment to hack Hugging Face
news.summary: The incident is unique because it was "driven, end to end, by an autonomous AI agent system," according to Hugging Face.

news.title: Reddit stock sinks on report it may not renew Google AI content deal
news.summary: Google's AI summaries have reduced traffic to websites from the search results page and Reddit is reconsidering the benefits of the deal, the Journal said.

news.title: AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic as part of computing power deal
news.summary: Anthropic's agreement with AMD is the latest in a string of infrastructure deals the company has announced this year to increase its computing capacity.

news.title: Samsung ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones ahead of expected Apple debut
news.summary: Samsung launched the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Flip8.

news.title: Samsung details features of its smart glasses as it enters market dominated by Meta
news.summary: The Samsung smart glasses are the tech giant's first foray into the product category which is currently dominated by Meta.

news.title: SpaceX ends its losing streak, oil prices jump, the Fed's AI red flags and more in Morning Squawk
news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Trump's push for American-made AI chips hits TSMC's margins
news.summary: The Taiwan-based chipmaker has announced $200 billion in investment into U.S. manufacturing since Trump returned to power in 2025.

news.title: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
news.summary: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.

news.title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
news.summary: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.

news.title: Wall Street can wait: Why one U.S. biotech firm is listing in Hong Kong first
news.summary: Global biotech firms are increasingly being drawn to Hong Kong for its growing investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners.

news.title: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
news.summary: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.

news.title: OpenAI, Anthropic boost lobbying as legacy tech and defense spending slips
news.summary: The two AI developers spent a combined $3.17 million in the second quarter, up 23% from the first three months of 2026.

news.title: Google expands Gemini lineup with cheaper models and new Mythos rival
news.summary: Google is expanding Gemini with cheaper, more efficient models and a new cybersecurity offering as it tries to close product gaps and compete on cost.

news.title: Texas Instruments Gets Lukewarm Reaction to Upbeat Forecast
news.summary: Texas Instruments Inc., the biggest maker of analog and embedded processing chips, gave a sales forecast that topped estimates but failed to excite investors, who have bid up the company’s shares this year.

news.title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
news.summary: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

news.title: Alphabet Hikes Spending Outlook in Race to Build AI Data Centers
news.summary: Alphabet Inc. again raised already sky-high estimates for capital spending in 2026, telling investors that expenses may top $200 billion as it races to build the computing power necessary to fuel its artificial intelligence ambitions.

news.title: Samsung’s $400,000 Bonus Fuels Labor Disputes Across South Korea
news.summary: Labor unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics Co. caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than $400,000 to some of its employees.

news.title: US Official Says Moonshot Accessed Banned Nvidia Chips
news.summary: A White House official accused China’s Moonshot of improperly using US artificial intelligence models and Nvidia Corp. chips to create the Kimi K3 system that stunned the tech industry last week with its advanced capabilities.

news.title: Google Boosts 2026 Spending Estimate to as Much as $205 Billion
news.summary: Alphabet Inc. projected full-year capital expenditures will be $195 billion to $205 billion in 2026, increasing its already sky-high spending estimate for the year as it works to secure an edge in the artificial intelligence race.

news.title: AI Mania to Fuel Australia Deals, Top Underwriter Macquarie Says
news.summary: The investor demand for exposure to companies along the artificial intelligence supply chain is set to accelerate capital-market activity in Australia, according to the nation’s top dealmaker.

news.title: Google Says Cloud Services Backlog Expands to $514 Billion
news.summary: Alphabet Inc. said its cloud computing unit had a $514 billion backlog of contracted work that hasn’t been recorded as revenue yet, signaling robust demand for its services that underpin the artificial intelligence boom.

news.title: Alphabet Posts $98 Billion in Second-Quarter Investment Gains
news.summary: Alphabet Inc. on Wednesday reported investment gains of $98 billion as part of its second-quarter earnings results.

news.title: ServiceNow Posts Strong Sales and Bookings, Touts AI Strength
news.summary: ServiceNow Inc. reported better-than-expected quarterly sales and bookings, boosting Wall Street’s hopes that the software maker’s new artificial intelligence tools will spur growth.

news.title: Cable One Faces 12% Yield to Fund Buyout After Debt Swap Stalls
news.summary: Cable One Inc. is facing a steep cost to finalize the buyout of a company whose debt it has indicated it may not support when it comes due next year.

news.title: OpenAI President Says Kimi K3 ‘Pretty Good,’ Unsure If Distilled
news.summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman acknowledged that Moonshot AI had developed a competitive new artificial intelligence model and said he wasn’t sure whether the Chinese firm had piggybacked on the ChatGPT maker’s technology.

news.title: OpenAI’s Brockman on New ChatGPT Era After ‘Tough’ Year of Cuts: Q&A
news.summary: The AI startup has combined its products into a so-called super app.

news.title: ‘Golden Age’ Dawns for Technology IPOs, Barclays Banker Says
news.summary: The market for initial public offerings in the technology sector is entering what Barclays’ Jamie Turturici, head of TMT equity capital markets, called “a golden age” as a slew of companies head for public markets.

news.title: Tesla (TSLA) Earnings: Live Q2 2026 Results, Elon Musk Comments
Meta Avoids Second Addiction Trial as Teen Accuser Drops Case
news.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. won’t have to face a second trial over claims that social media platforms are addictive to minors because the plaintiff is dismissing the case, according to his lawyers.

news.title: OpenAI Models Breach Hugging Face, Sparking Cyber Alarms
news.summary: Since April, when Anthropic PBC unveiled its Mythos model, cyber and national security experts have warned that the internet has entered a new era full of artificial intelligence-powered risks.

news.title: OpenAI Models Escaped to Hack Hugging Face, Validating Cyber Warnings
news.summary: “Sandbox” testing environments are meant to isolate risky cyber threats.

news.title: Revolut Confirms $115 Billion Valuation in Latest Share Sale
news.summary: Revolut Ltd. has kicked off a process for some employees to sell their shares in the company at a valuation of $115 billion, less than a year after it nabbed a valuation of $75 billion through a similar effort.

news.title: French Social Media Ban Kicks Off Wave of New Rules in the EU
news.summary: After months of debates across the continent, France became the first European Union member to ban social media for young teenagers this week, kicking off what’s set to be a wave of new regulations and pressuring the bloc to find a unified approach toward the big tech platforms.

news.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
news.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

news.title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
news.summary: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.

news.title: Tesla spending skyrockets as Cybercab, Semi, Megapack production timeline slips
news.summary: Tesla's 26% boost in revenue wasn't enough to offset rising operating expenses and capital expenditures as it pushes to launch a new generation of products.

news.title: Social media addiction lawsuit against Meta is dropped
news.summary: A closely watched social media addiction lawsuit that had been set to go to trial next week has been dropped after the plaintiff voluntarily dismissed his claims against Meta, leaving none of the major tech companies facing trial in the case.

news.title: SoundCloud acquires decentralized music platform Nina Protocol months after its shutdown
news.summary: SoundCloud has acquired decentralized music platform Nina Protocol, months after the startup announced it would shut down. The deal brings Nina’s artists, editorial archive, and music discovery tools to SoundCloud as the company continues expanding its platform for independent musicians.

news.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
news.summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.

news.title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
news.summary: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

news.title: Science Corporation’s vision-restoring chip wins EU approval
news.summary: "The thing that the space needs is a company making $100 million a year of revenue," Science Corp. CEO Max Hodak said.

news.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
news.summary: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding. Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.

news.title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains why Anthropic is winning (and it’s not the model)
news.summary: Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not in the internet wave, not in mobile, not in the first cloud boom. Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and ...

news.title: Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI
news.summary: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.

news.title: Google is making it easier to switch from iPhone to Android
news.summary: The new feature lets users wirelessly transfer more data types from an iPhone without needing to download a separate app.

news.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
news.summary: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

news.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
news.summary: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

news.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
news.summary: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

news.title: If you pay a hacker’s ransom, chances are that they’ll come back for more
news.summary: The long-held understanding among security researchers and network defenders is that it's impossible to negotiate in good faith with an extortion racket because there's no incentive for the other side to actually walk away.

news.title: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects
news.summary: a16z Speedrun, Ada Ventures, and Snowball VC have invested in Cascade's $3.5 million seed round.

news.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari

news.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
news.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

news.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more
news.summary: WhatsApp on Apple CarPlay and Android Auto will let users hear and reply to messages, make calls, view their call history, and access favorite contacts hands-free and right from their car's screen.

The Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra don't seem geared toward people who bought last year's model; aside from a few design updates and […]

news.summary: Samsung's newest foldables are here. At Galaxy Unpacked, the company announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. news.title: Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC
news.summary: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility efforts today by bringing original Xbox games to PC. AAPL.fact_check: iOS 코드 관련 루머는 아직 공식 확인되지 않았으나, Bloomberg의 보도로 신뢰성이 높습니다. 삼성의 신제품 발표는 애플의 신제품 출시를 앞둔 시점에서 주목할 만한 경쟁 요소입니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: 뉴스에서 애플 관련 부정적인 요소가 일부 있으나, 전반적인 시장 심리는 중립적이며 Fear & Greed 지수는 약간의 두려움을 나타냅니다.
AAPL.key_insight: 애플의 주가는 현재 목표가보다 약간 높지만, 시장의 전반적인 심리는 중립적입니다. 삼성의 신제품 발표는 애플의 경쟁력을 시험할 수 있는 요소로 작용할 수 있습니다. 투자자들은 애플의 신제품 출시와 관련된 소식에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: 현재 주가는 목표가를 약간 상회하고 있으며, 시장의 심리가 중립적이기 때문입니다.
risk_factors: 경쟁사의 신제품 출시로 인한 시장 점유율 감소 가능성
iOS 코드 관련 루머로 인한 소비자 신뢰도 저하
catalysts: 기술 혁신을 통한 시장 점유율 확대
AAPL.summary_one_line: 애플의 주가는 목표가를 약간 상회하며, 신제품 출시와 관련된 소식에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

MSFT.fact_check: Microsoft의 Xbox 게임을 PC로 확장하는 소식은 공식 발표된 사실입니다. 이는 Microsoft의 게임 사업 확장 전략의 일환으로 보입니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: Microsoft의 게임 확장 소식은 긍정적이나, 시장의 전반적인 불안감이 존재합니다.
MSFT.key_insight: Microsoft는 Xbox 게임을 PC로 확장하여 게임 시장에서의 입지를 강화하고 있습니다. 이는 Microsoft의 장기적인 성장 가능성을 높이는 긍정적인 요소입니다. 그러나 현재 시장의 불안정성은 투자에 주의가 필요합니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 시장의 불안정성으로 인해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: Microsoft는 게임 사업 확장을 통해 성장 가능성을 높이고 있으나, 시장 불안정성으로 인해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Google의 AI 관련 지출 증가와 클라우드 서비스의 수요 증가는 공식적으로 확인된 사실입니다. Reddit과의 AI 콘텐츠 계약 갱신 여부는 아직 확정되지 않았습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: 뉴스에서 AI와 클라우드 사업의 긍정적인 발전이 강조되었고, Fear & Greed 지수는 중립에 가까우며, Stocktwits의 Bullish 비율도 긍정적입니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Google은 AI와 클라우드 서비스에 대한 막대한 투자를 통해 미래 성장을 준비하고 있습니다. 이러한 투자는 장기적으로 회사의 수익성을 높일 수 있는 중요한 요소입니다. 그러나 단기적으로는 높은 자본 지출이 시장에 부담으로 작용할 수 있습니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: AI와 클라우드 사업의 강력한 성장 가능성은 장기적인 투자 매력도를 높입니다.
risk_factors: AI와 클라우드 사업에 대한 과도한 자본 지출
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Google의 AI와 클라우드 사업 확장은 장기적인 성장 가능성을 높이는 주요 요소입니다.

AMZN.fact_check: Amazon의 AGI 부서에서 일부 인력을 감축했다는 뉴스는 사실이며, 이는 공식적으로 확인된 사항이다. 8-K 공시도 SEC에 제출되었으므로 공식 확인된 정보이다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가에도 불구하고, 시장의 Fear & Greed 지표가 '공포'를 나타내고 있어 중립 이상의 긍정적 심리가 형성됨.
AMZN.key_insight: Amazon의 인공지능 부문에서의 인력 감축은 단기적으로 부정적일 수 있으나, 장기적으로는 비용 절감과 기술 집중을 통해 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 현재 주가는 분석가 목표가에 비해 저평가되어 있어 매력적이다. 시장의 전반적인 공포 심리에도 불구하고, Amazon의 강력한 시장 지위는 긍정적 요인으로 작용할 가능성이 높다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력 매수 추천과 목표가 대비 저평가된 주가가 매수 기회를 제공한다.
risk_factors: 인공지능 부문 인력 감축으로 인한 기술 개발 지연
AMZN.summary_one_line: Amazon은 현재 저평가된 상태로, 분석가의 강력 매수 추천을 받고 있어 투자 기회가 될 수 있다.

NVDA.fact_check: Bloomberg의 보도는 중국의 Moonshot이 Nvidia 칩을 부적절하게 사용했다는 주장을 담고 있으나, 이는 아직 공식적으로 확인되지 않았다. SEC의 8-K 공시는 공식적인 정보로 신뢰할 수 있다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가에도 불구하고, 시장의 두려움 지수와 중립적인 소셜 미디어 반응이 혼재되어 있다.
NVDA.key_insight: NVIDIA의 주가는 현재 긍정적인 분석가 평가와 목표가에 힘입어 상승세를 보이고 있다. 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수는 여전히 높은 편이므로 투자자들은 주의가 필요하다. 특히, 중국과의 기술 분쟁 가능성은 주가에 영향을 미칠 수 있는 중요한 변수이다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: 시장의 두려움 지수와 중국과의 기술 분쟁 가능성을 고려할 때, 당분간 관망이 적절하다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: NVIDIA는 긍정적인 분석가 평가에도 불구하고 시장의 불확실성으로 인해 관망이 추천된다.

META.fact_check: 삼성의 스마트 글래스 시장 진입은 사실이며, 메타가 주도하는 시장에 새로운 경쟁자가 등장했습니다. 소셜 미디어 중독 소송은 원고의 자진 철회로 메타에 유리하게 종료되었습니다.
META.sentiment_reason: 뉴스는 메타에 긍정적이며, Fear & Greed 지수는 중립에 가까운 'fear' 상태, Stocktwits의 Bullish 비율은 균형을 이루고 있습니다.
META.key_insight: 메타는 소셜 미디어 중독 소송에서 유리한 결과를 얻어 법적 리스크가 줄어들었습니다. 삼성의 스마트 글래스 시장 진입은 메타의 경쟁력을 시험할 수 있는 요소입니다. 전반적인 시장 심리는 중립적이지만, 메타의 장기적 성장 가능성은 여전히 높습니다.
META.recommendation_reason: 현재 시장 심리가 중립적이며, 법적 리스크 해소와 경쟁 심화가 혼재된 상황입니다.
risk_factors: 삼성의 스마트 글래스 시장 진입으로 인한 경쟁 심화
소셜 미디어 플랫폼의 규제 강화 가능성
catalysts: 소송 철회로 인한 법적 리스크 감소
META.summary_one_line: 메타는 법적 리스크 해소와 함께 경쟁 심화 속에서 성장 가능성을 유지하고 있습니다.

TSLA.fact_check: Tesla의 실적 발표는 주가 하락 중에 나왔으며, 주요 자동차 사업이 회복 중임에도 불구하고 수익성 악화가 확인되었습니다. 이는 공식적으로 확인된 사실입니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: Tesla의 수익성 악화에도 불구하고 자동차 사업의 회복과 분석가들의 긍정적 전망이 종합적으로 반영되었습니다.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 최근 실적 발표는 수익성 악화로 인해 주가에 부정적 영향을 미쳤습니다. 그러나 자동차 사업의 회복은 긍정적인 신호로 볼 수 있습니다. 투자자들은 Tesla의 장기적인 성장 가능성을 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: Tesla의 수익성 악화와 시장의 불안정성을 고려할 때, 관망이 적절합니다.
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla의 수익성 악화에도 불구하고 자동차 사업의 회복은 긍정적 신호입니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 전반적으로 혼조세를 보이고 있으며, 투자자들은 신중한 접근이 필요합니다. 주요 기술주들이 긍정적인 평가를 받고 있지만, 시장의 불확실성으로 인해 관망이 추천됩니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Amazon은 현재 저평가된 상태로, 분석가의 강력 매수 추천을 받고 있어 투자 기회가 될 수 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 신중하게 시장을 관망하며, 저평가된 종목에 대한 매수 기회를 노려볼 수 있습니다. 특히, 장기적인 성장 가능성이 있는 종목에 주목하는 것이 좋습니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: AI 인프라 투자 증가와 시장 영향
daily_insights.Full_Summary: 최근 IBM, Google, ServiceNow 등 주요 기업들이 AI 인프라에 대한 투자를 확대하고 있으며, 이는 기업의 수익 전망과 시장의 투자 심리에 큰 영향을 미치고 있다. IBM은 AI 인프라에 대한 고객의 우선순위로 인해 연간 수익 성장 전망을 하향 조정했으며, Google은 AI와 클라우드 사업의 성장에 힘입어 자본 지출 전망을 크게 상향 조정했다. 이러한 움직임은 AI 기술의 중요성을 강조하며, 관련 기업들의 주가에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: AI 인프라에 대한 투자 증가는 관련 기업들의 성장 가능성을 높이며, 특히 Google과 IBM 같은 대형 기술 기업의 주가에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다.
